itemListElement.reviewBody:
I like to share very positive feedback about Global Rabbee. The staff here are passionate and committed to creating a nurturing and supportive environment for their students. The school's focus on individualized attention and small class sizes has enabled a child to receive personalized instruction and support
Overall, I would highly recommend GR School to any parent looking for a school that priorities their children welfare, completely loved their Eduquest. The school's commitment to creating a well-rounded education for their students is truly exceptional, and I am grateful for the positive impact it has had on my child's overall development. Thank you GR❤️!

Hats-off to the entrepreneurial spirit of Aishwarya mam! The teachers and the management is organised and very helpful. My daughter enjoyed going to class and being with her friends.
Satisfaction is beyond the level

I had a wonderful experience with Global rabbee T nagar . The staff, especially Swathi mam and Babitha mam, went above and beyond to create a nurturing and engaging environment for the children. Their dedication and care truly stand out. My child loves going to school every day, and I'm grateful for the positive impact they've had. The school's focus on both education and overall development is impressive. My child has shown tremendous growth and enthusiasm since joining. parents looking for a top-notch preschool in T nagar please go ahead with GR.Kudos to the team for their exceptional efforts! Thank you Aishu mam for everything

When we arrived in Chennai, as parents, we were worried about our kids' school, and adapting to the new environment is a huge task.

Initially, my son was hesitant and tearful about starting school, but he quickly adjusted and made friends. He grew fond of his class teacher  and Akka, his days at school became filled with happiness. I’m immensely grateful to the school staff for creating such a positive environment that allowed him to enjoy every moment and actively engage in learning everything that's taught

More specifically, when we went to the school and the way Aishwariya mam had explained about the school and teaching methodology, my husband and me were soo much impressed that we never look around for another School

We are super glad that my child now happily goes to Global Rabbee and Super happy to be part of GR Family❤️

I wanted a good learning environment to my son who is 2.5 years old.Global rabee is amazing,fun filled and caring play school in tnagar.My son had learnt so many good things from this play school.

The quality and commitment from teachers is amazing and no words to express my gratitude.They have provided good quality of books and conducted a good annual day function.

So happy my son has been to Global rabee..

Children at this age require a welcoming and comfortable place to stay while they study. The unique aspect of the Global Rabbee is that, where parents can leave their worries when their children are at GR. The entire teaching and support staff is excellent. In particular, Deepa ma'am is a committed educator who shows excessive patience and offers each child individual attention.

Hello Aishu/All Teachers.. Hope all are doing good.. Am posting this on behalf of my son (Anang) He enjoys going to school when he was in GR T. Nagar. It's been 2 years.. When ever he sees his old pic or video you sent.. He used to say i wish we stayed in T. Nagar itself. I like T. Nagar GR very much..

Exact words what he said :
En amma namma anga irunthu Inga vanthom enakku T. Nagar Global Rabbee than rombha pidikum... Enakku anga ponum nu aasaya irukku...

It's been 2+ years... Still he has so many good memories about GR T. Nagar...

All credits to Aishu mam, teachers and akka's..

My sincere thanks to all.

Hello everyone...I'm really happy and cannot express in words that as a parent how blessed and happy we are for enrolling our kid in Global rabbee.  A happy learning is important for our children and if ur finding a safe and happy place for ur kid ,ur into the right place.  My daughter is the happiest when she is at school...A big kudos to the whole team for bringing everyone together...

My rating for the school is 5.. As a parent..I assure this school will be best to pave way for a wonderful start in our kid's education.. anyone can teach studies.. but here, they teach kids moral values!!! Kids will be well disciplined.. they come to know what's needed,.. for their practical life along with studies and ofcourse their vocabulary and skill develop more at Global Rabbee T nagar .. A SPECIAL THANKS TO TEACHERS AND CARE TAKERS.. FOR TAKING FULLEST CARE OF MY KID.. I AM A HAPPY PARENT OF  GR.. THANK YOU

I am really very happy to share my experience with GR and I am very much satisfied that I have taken a right decision to put my kid in her first stage of schooling..My kid thoroughly enjoyed her school each and everyday for the past 2 years..Right from principal Mam everyone is so kind and they make sure all the kids are comfortable with their activities whatever they do.I am eeling sad that we are going to miss this school.
